title: Rapid extraction of total lipids from microalgae
author: Yingyu Hu
materials: Flash freeze filters and stored at -80 °C
Latex bulbs are required for Pasteur pipets
Directly weigh 0.44 g KCl in the bottle. Potassium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P3911-500G
Dispense 2.0 mL Folch solvent into sample tube.

Use a new pasteur pipet to transfer the lower organic phase to a clear 12 mL storage vial. Do not disturb the cell debris in between the two phases. Clear vial helps to check if there is water drops or impurities in lipids extract after dried. Glass Vials PTFE/SILiCone SEPTA Clear (16 mL, Thermo Scientific, B7990-4) Screw Vial Convenience Kit, 12mL solid top PTFE cap (Thermo Scientific, B7800-12A)

steps.title: Rinse forceps with 95% ethanol, air-dry
steps.instruction: Rinse forceps with 95% ethanol, air-dry. Filter forceps (blunt end, stainless steel, Millipore, XX6200006P) Wipe-dry forceps can cause carbon contamination of samples.

steps.title: Filter microalgae in liquid media onto...
steps.instruction: Filter microalgae in liquid media onto precombusted GFF filters, using gentle vacuum pressure (130 mm Hg).

steps.title: Rinse sample with filtered seawater
steps.instruction: Rinse sample with filtered seawater

steps.title: Place sample filters in cryogenic vials
steps.instruction: Place sample filters in cryogenic vials

steps.title: Filter blank media (without cells) through...
steps.instruction: Filter blank media (without cells) through precombusted GFF filter as blank.

steps.title: Freeze dry before measurement
steps.instruction: Freeze dry before measurement. FreeZone® 2.5 L Benchtop Freeze Dryers (Labconco®, 700202000)

steps.title: Follow <Total particulate carbohydrate from microalgae>...
steps.instruction: Follow <Total particulate carbohydrate from microalgae> protocol to hydrolyze the sample. Hydrolysation treatment can improve the extraction efficiency:

steps.title: Precombust the centrifuge tubes at 500 °C for 06:00:00
steps.instruction: Precombust the centrifuge tubes at 500 °C for 06:00:00

steps.title: Precombust pasteur pipets at 500 °C...
steps.instruction: Precombust pasteur pipets at 500 °C for 02:00:00 Disposable Soda-Lime Glass Pasteur Pipets (5 3/4", Fisherbrand, 13-678-6A)

steps.title: Rinse caps with 95% ethanol and air-dry prior to use
steps.instruction: Rinse caps with 95% ethanol and air-dry prior to use

steps.title: Mix two parts of chloroform and...
steps.instruction: Mix two parts of chloroform and one part of methanol in a 1 L amber bottle. Log the volume of each solvent for double checking the ratio. %s %s Chloroform (HPLC grade) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #439142-4L Methanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34860 (CAS: 67-56-1)

steps.title: Attach dispensette to the bottle, mix well
steps.instruction: Attach dispensette to the bottle, mix well. Bottle-top dispenser (BrandTech Dispensette® S, 4731330)

steps.title: Label bottle with MSDS label
steps.instruction: Label bottle with MSDS label.

steps.title: KCl solution ( 0
steps.instruction: KCl solution ( 0.88 % ) 1.5 mL per sample

steps.title: Weigh the pyrex media bottle and tare
steps.instruction: Weigh the pyrex media bottle and tare. PYREX® Media Bottles (Corning®, 1395-100)

steps.title: Top bottle with MilliQ water to 50 g %s %s
steps.instruction: Top bottle with MilliQ water to 50 g %s %s

steps.title: If lipids samples are not processed...
steps.instruction: If lipids samples are not processed for carbohydrate, transfer freeze dried samples and blanks into muffled centrifuge tubes Disposable Glass Screw-Cap Centrifuge Tubes (10 mL, Corning®, 99502-10) Polypropylene Screw Caps (Linerless, 15-415, Kimble Chase, 73805-15415)

steps.title: Add 100 µL MilliQ directly onto the sample
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL MilliQ directly onto the sample.

steps.title: Remove vials from freezer
steps.instruction: Remove vials from freezer.

steps.title: Purge the dispensette, fill the tubing...
steps.instruction: Purge the dispensette, fill the tubing with solvent before dispensing solvent into sample tube.

steps.title: If lipids samples have been hydrolyzed...
steps.instruction: If lipids samples have been hydrolyzed for carbohydrate and solvent has already been added, go to the vortex step directly.

steps.title: Vortex 00:28:00 by using a tube insert
steps.instruction: Vortex 00:28:00 by using a tube insert. VWR ANALOG VORTEX MIXER (VWR, 10153-838, With tube insert)

steps.title: Sonicate 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Sonicate 00:02:00

steps.title: Vortex 00:30:00 by using a tube insert
steps.instruction: Vortex 00:30:00 by using a tube insert.

steps.title: Prepare one set of precombusted tubes...
steps.instruction: Prepare one set of precombusted tubes (#T1), label the tubes, cap is not required. Disposable Glass Screw-Cap Centrifuge Tubes (10 mL, Corning®, 99502-10)

steps.title: Place one pasteur pipet into each...
steps.instruction: Place one pasteur pipet into each tube (#T1) Disposable Pasteur Pipet (9 inch, VWR, 14672-380)

steps.title: Prepare another set of precombusted tubes (#T2) for extract
steps.instruction: Prepare another set of precombusted tubes (#T2) for extract. Cap the tube to avoid contamination. Disposable Glass Screw-Cap Centrifuge Tubes (10 mL, Corning®, 99502-10) Polypropylene Screw Caps (Linerless, 15-415, Kimble Chase, 73805-15415)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes General-purpose benchtop centrifuge (IEC CENTRA CL2, Thermo, 00427 0F)

steps.title: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue.

steps.title: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00

steps.title: Sonicate 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Sonicate 00:02:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes

steps.title: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2
steps.instruction: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 mL KCl solution to T2, vortex and then centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes Volume of Folch solvent to KCl is about 4 to 1.

steps.title: Turn on heat block to 37...
steps.instruction: Turn on heat block to 37 °C , use a thermometer to monitor the actual temperature. LSE digital dry bath heater (Corning, 6885-DB) Blocks for Corning® LSE Digital Dry Bath Heaters (Corning, 480124)

steps.title: Place tubes (#T2) in the heater
steps.instruction: Place tubes (#T2) in the heater. Organic layer turns foggy when temperature is lower than 37 °C

steps.title: Dry organic phase extract at 37...
steps.instruction: Dry organic phase extract at 37 °C under a stream of N 2 gas (<2 psi) for about 00:30:00 . %s %s Reacti-Vap Evaporator (Thermo Scientific, TS-18825)

steps.title: The lipids extract might still have...
steps.instruction: The lipids extract might still have water residue (which can't be dried by nitrogen gas) or water soluble impurities. Redissolve it with 5 mL chloroform by using glass serological pipet, transfer certain amount of chloroform dissolved extract for lipids measurement (based on the estimation, 20 to 100 ug) into a new vial. Log the actual volume transferred. Safetypette (Jencons, 75856-442)

steps.title: Dry extract at 37 °C under...
steps.instruction: Dry extract at 37 °C under a stream of N 2 gas (<2 psi) (Generally 2 mL/5 min). %s %s

steps.title: Store dried extract and excess extract...
steps.instruction: Store dried extract and excess extract (in chloroform) at -80 °C .

steps.title: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2
steps.instruction: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2. If some debris precipitate at the bottom, gentle blow air bubble through pasteur pipet to relocate it to water layer. Avoid transferring water layer and debris into #T2

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes General-purpose benchtop centrifuge (IEC CENTRA CL2, Thermo, 00427 0F)

steps.title: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2
steps.instruction: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2.

steps.title: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue.

steps.title: Sonicate 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Sonicate 00:02:00

steps.title: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3200 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes General-purpose benchtop centrifuge (IEC CENTRA CL2, Thermo, 00427 0F)

steps.title: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2
steps.instruction: Use the pasteur pipet to transfer organic layer to #T2.

steps.title: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL Folch solvent to the residue.

steps.title: Sonicate 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Sonicate 00:02:00

steps.title: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Vortex by using a tube insert for about 00:10:00
